name: Outbreak Ops
description: The outbreak has begun. Cities have fallen, military bases are overrun, and the undead are spreading fast. In OUTBREAK OPS, you are one of the last survivors sent into quarantine zones to eliminate infected hordes and complete dangerous missions. Battle through abandoned compounds, dark bunkers, ruined streets, and military labs while fighting endless waves of zombies. Earn coins, unlock stronger weapons, upgrade your gear, and survive increasingly difficult missions. Choose your playstyle with pistols, shotguns, SMGs, sniper rifles, flamethrowers, and miniguns. Face terrifying boss zombies with unique attack patterns and survive across 15
instructions: Desktop WASD rarr Move Mouse rarr Aim Left Click rarr Shoot R rarr Reload Shift rarr Dash Space rarr Grenade Mobile Virtual joystick On-screen combat buttons
